review_scope.purpose: sanitized review of selected private radiology artifacts
review_scope.aos_role: explainable/verifiable control layer around model outputs

verified_internal_artifacts.label_mapping: label 2 is SNFH in local dataset metadata
verified_internal_artifacts.publication_boundary: selected small-fold model-output evidence only; not cohort-level performance; not published as Whole Tumor or BraTS 2025 evidence
internal in-silico cohort report only; not clinical validation, certification, compliance, or production-readiness evidence
private formal-integrity evidence only; not Python-to-Lean refinement, segmentation correctness, clinical safety, or production audit proof

safe_public_summary: Private internal artifacts include selected promising radiology model-output metrics and a successful formal-integrity build, but this repository does not publish clinical validation, production readiness, regulatory compliance, or SOTA claims.
